name: Bailey's Irish Cream
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Half & half or whipping cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure out 1 cup of whiskey and pour it into the blender.
2. Add 14 ounces of sweetened condensed milk to the blender.
3. Pour in 1 cup of half-and-half or whipping cream.
4. Stir in 4 eggs.
5. Incorporate 1/2 cup of chocolate syrup.
6. Add 2 teaspoons of instant coffee.
7. Mix in 3 teaspoons of vanilla extract.
8. Finally, add 1 tablespoon of sugar.
9. Secure the lid and blend until all ingredients are well combined, taking about 1 to 2 minutes.
10. Remove the mixture from the blender and place it in the refrigerator to chill.
